title: Monetary policy - Reserve Bank of New Zealand - Te Pūtea Matua
content:
It looks like the browser you're using doesn’t work well with our website. For a better experience, please update to the latest version of Chrome , Edge , Firefox or Safari .
We use monetary policy to achieve our target of keeping inflation between 1% and 3% on average over the medium term.

### What is monetary policy?
We call our work to influence interest rates and the amount of money in the economy monetary policy.
See a timeline of our past monetary policy and Official Cash Rate (OCR) announcements.

### Monetary Policy Statements
We publish our Monetary Policy Statement 4 times a year.

### Monetary policy tools
We use a range of monetary policy tools to control inflation and keep prices stable.
